nodes.label: Query OFF v1 CGI search; return MacrosPer100g for first usable product, or None.
nodes.norm_label: query off v1 cgi search; return macrosper100g for first usable product, or none.

nodes.label: Search generic_foods by ilike on name_normalized. Returns up to 10 rows.
nodes.norm_label: search generic_foods by ilike on name_normalized. returns up to 10 rows.

nodes.label: Return a cached PyJWKClient instance for the given JWKS URL.
nodes.norm_label: return a cached pyjwkclient instance for the given jwks url.

nodes.label: Decode and verify an ES256 JWT using JWKS. Raises AuthError on any failure.
nodes.norm_label: decode and verify an es256 jwt using jwks. raises autherror on any failure.

nodes.label: Lowercase and strip accents (NFD decomposition, remove Mn category).
nodes.norm_label: lowercase and strip accents (nfd decomposition, remove mn category).

nodes.label: Patch PyJWKClient so tests never hit the network.
nodes.norm_label: patch pyjwkclient so tests never hit the network.

nodes.label: Tests for Settings startup validator and JWT aud/iss verification (T10).
nodes.norm_label: tests for settings startup validator and jwt aud/iss verification (t10).

nodes.label: A token with wrong aud claim must raise AuthError.
nodes.norm_label: a token with wrong aud claim must raise autherror.

nodes.label: A token with wrong iss claim must raise AuthError.
nodes.norm_label: a token with wrong iss claim must raise autherror.

nodes.label: A token with correct aud and iss must decode successfully.
nodes.norm_label: a token with correct aud and iss must decode successfully.

nodes.label: One matched item + one unmatched: totals reflect only matched actuals.
nodes.norm_label: one matched item + one unmatched: totals reflect only matched actuals.

nodes.label: Service that returns one matched item per food in the payload.
nodes.norm_label: service that returns one matched item per food in the payload.

nodes.label: An item with a missing required field (name) must yield 422.
nodes.norm_label: an item with a missing required field (name) must yield 422.

nodes.label: POST /food/match with a tampered token returns 401.
nodes.norm_label: post /food/match with a tampered token returns 401.
